summary: Thirteen military equipment targets were assessed, all confirmed as NO DAMAGE. The scene depicts a long convoy of armored vehicles moving across a dry, dusty terrain, kicking up significant dust clouds as they advance in formation. The consistent operational status of all assessed targets suggests the convoy is actively engaged in movement with no observed combat damage or functional impairment.
